ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the project */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the component belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "assignee" TEXT /* Email address of the assignee */,
  "cc_list" TEXT /* Email addresses of the CC list */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the component is active or not */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action to be taken on the component (e.g., Delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the component */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the component */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the component */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the component (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the issue is related to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "assignee" TEXT /* Email address of the assignee */,
  "cc_list" TEXT /* Email addresses of the CC list */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the issue */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the issue */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the issue */,
  "labels" TEXT /* JSON array to store labels or tags associated with the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Developer, Project Manager, Admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array to store the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Component Update, Issue Update) */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  "cc_list" TEXT /* Email addresses of the CC list */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the notification email */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the notification email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)
